_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to talk about different types of texts from a range of cultures and experiences.

_source.w: We are learning to talk about different types of texts from a range of cultures and experiences.
y: Reading texts from different cultures opens our minds to new perspectives.
Discussing diverse texts helps us appreciate the richness of the world around us.
This builds our understanding and empathy for people whose lives are different from ours.
eg: We read a story from another culture and discuss what we learned about their traditions.
We compare a story from our own background with one from a different culture.
We talk about what is similar and different in stories from around the world.
We discuss how the characters in a multicultural text think, feel and act.
We share our own cultural stories with the class and explain what they mean to us.
We create a class display of stories from the many cultures in our community.
